fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 32-year-old Hispanic female with schizoaffective disorder in suicidal crisis.
fields.Subjective: Ms. Lopez brought by crisis team after sister found her with noose prepared in closet. Sister reports patient stopped lurasidone completely 8 weeks ago due to nausea, saying she'd rather be sick mentally than physically. Since then, complete breakdown. Profound depression with complete inability to function, hasn't left bed except for suicide preparations. Constant auditory hallucinations telling her she's worthless burden and family hates her. Paranoid beliefs that coworkers spread rumors causing job loss and ruining her reputation. No sleep for days before today. Refusing food, weight down 18 lbs. Lost teaching job 6 weeks ago after extended absence. Evicted last week, living with sister temporarily. Sister found detailed suicide plan and goodbye letters to family members. Patient states she planned to hang herself tonight after sister left for work. Admits ongoing plan to complete suicide. Mood 'there's no point anymore' rated 0/10. Denies substance use. Safety: active SI with detailed plan, prepared means, strong intent, imminent danger. (Assessed by Dr. Sandra Martinez, Crisis Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Disheveled, malnourished, poor eye contact, appears profoundly hopeless
Mental_Status_Examination.Thought_Content: Active SI with detailed plan and prepared means, command hallucinations to die, paranoid ideation
Mental_Status_Examination.Thought_Process: Severely slowed, ruminative, perseverative on death

Behavioral_Health_Checkup.C_SSRS: Active suicidal ideation with specific plan, prepared means, and imminent intent

fields.Current_Medications: Lurasidone 80 mg PO qHS with food (stopped 8 weeks ago)
fields.Diagnostic_Impression: Schizoaffective disorder, depressive type, with life-threatening imminent suicidal crisis after medication discontinuation.
fields.Psychosocial_Context: Recently evicted; recently unemployed; living temporarily with sister; imminent suicide plan with prepared means.
Assessment_and_Plan: Life-threatening imminent crisis after stopping lurasidone 8 weeks ago.
Active SI with detailed plan, prepared noose, imminent intent for tonight.
Extreme imminent danger requires immediate intervention.
Meets criteria for involuntary hospitalization - imminent danger to self.
Emergency ambulance transport to locked inpatient psychiatric unit.
Will restart lurasidone with anti-nausea medication.
Consider ECT given severity and resistance.
Sister to remove all potential means from home.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. Sandra Martinez, Crisis Psychiatrist — Mobile Crisis Response Team, 1500 Crisis Services Road, Miami, FL 33101, Phone: (555) 334-8874, Fax: (555) 334-8875
